# Lista a tablica

::: {#38f732e2 .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.python .cell-code}
import numpy as np
import time

start_time = time.time()
my_arr = np.arange(1000000)
my_list = list(range(1000000))
start_time = time.time()
my_arr2 = my_arr * 2
print("--- %s seconds ---" % (time.time() - start_time))
start_time = time.time()
my_list2 = [x * 2 for x in my_list]
print("--- %s seconds ---" % (time.time() - start_time))
```
